summary: Frontend testing complete for shaka button fix. All 4 requirements verified working: 1) Shaka icon displays correctly using Twemoji CDN (1f919.svg), 2) Toggle works properly - clicking alternates between liked/unliked, 3) Like count updates correctly (+1/-1), 4) Visual indicator changes between colored (liked) and grayscale (unliked).

verified_features.Shaka Icon Display: PASS - Loading from Twemoji CDN https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/1f919.svg (proper 🤙 shaka hand)
verified_features.Like Toggle Behavior: PASS - Click 1: LIKE (grayscale removed), Click 2: UNLIKE (grayscale added), Click 3: LIKE (grayscale removed)
verified_features.Like Count Updates: PASS - 1→2 shakas on like, 2→1 shakas on unlike, 1→2 shakas on like again
verified_features.Visual Indicator: PASS - Liked: filter:none (yellow/golden), Unliked: filter:grayscale(100%) brightness(1.5) (grey)

test_steps_executed: 3. Found 7 posts with shaka icons from Twemoji CDN
4. Initial state: grayscale icon, 1 shakas count

success_rate.backend: N/A (not tested this iteration - verified in iteration_16)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing posts and user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shaka button fix verified working. Icon uses Twemoji CDN image (1f919.svg) for consistent cross-browser rendering. Toggle logic in Feed.js works correctly with optimistic updates and server sync. Visual states properly indicate liked (colored) vs unliked (grayscale).
